items.title: Add make build as pre-test dependency
items.description: Stale binary caused confusing flag_matrix test failures. Add make build as a prerequisite in the test target.
items.evidence: Stale ao binary missing memory command caused misleading test errors

items.title: Extract shared test helpers into testutil_test.go
items.description: Duplicate helper declarations across parallel agents caused compile errors. Consolidate setupAgentsDir, captureStdout, and other shared helpers.
items.evidence: Multiple agents independently declared same helpers; Go flat package model caused symbol collisions

items.title: Add negative-path integration tests for CLI error formatting
items.description: Tests are unit-focused on helper functions. No tests construct full Cobra command execution with invalid arguments to verify error output formatting.
items.evidence: Council tech-debt judge found zero integration-level error path tests

items.title: Create pre-flight checklist for parallel worktree sprints
items.description: Manual steps (pull main, make build, verify clean state, confirm wave boundaries) should be automated as a reusable script.
items.evidence: Had to pull from main mid-session; stale binary; wave boundary verification was all manual

items.title: Replace os.Chdir with path-based helpers for t.Parallel readiness
items.description: 20+ os.Chdir sites mutate process-global state preventing test parallelization. 46s runtime will grow. Refactor to accept dir as parameter.
items.evidence: Council found 174 defer-restore blocks and 20+ os.Chdir calls; no t.Parallel anywhere

items.title: Strengthen thin smoke tests (version, completion, promotion_defaults)
items.description: version_test.go (38 lines), completion_test.go (42 lines), promotion_defaults_test.go (23 lines) test registration not execution. Add RunE path coverage.
items.evidence: Council found these tests would pass even if RunE panicked

items.title: Replace time.Sleep with channel-based sync in stream tests
items.description: rpi_phased_stream_test.go uses time.Sleep(1s) for watchdog testing. Replace with channel-based polling for deterministic behavior.
items.evidence: Council identified time.Sleep(1*time.Second) at line 615 as the largest sleep

items.title: Unify chdirTemp/setupTempWorkdir into single helper
items.description: chdirTemp and setupTempWorkdir are functionally identical. Consolidate into one to reduce confusion.
items.evidence: Council found these are semantically identical with different origins

items.title: Replace cov3W2CaptureStdout fixed buffer with io.ReadAll
items.description: cov3W2CaptureStdout uses fixed 64KB buffer that silently truncates. Replace with io.ReadAll for safety.
items.evidence: Council identified 64KB truncation risk at testutil_test.go line 83

items.title: Pre-seed agent prompts with known framework footguns
items.description: Agents waste time rediscovering Cobra global state issues, os.Chdir scope limits. Pre-seed dispatch prompts with known constraints.
items.evidence: Negative-path agent had to discover Cobra flag reset issue independently

items.title: Sanitize agent shell environment to bypass aliases
items.description: cp alias was interactive, silently blocking file copy. Agent environments should use absolute paths or sanitized PATH.
items.evidence: cp alias prompted y/n during worktree merge, had to use /bin/cp -f

items.title: Add integration merge checklist script
items.description: Manual merge verification (diff review, symbol check, test run) should be automated as a script.
items.evidence: Post-merge steps were done manually; could miss issues at scale

items.title: Refactor production code to accept projectDir parameter
items.description: 160+ os.Chdir sites in tests exist because 50+ production functions call os.Getwd(). Refactor to accept dir parameter for t.Parallel readiness.
items.evidence: Item 5 audit found all 160+ sites require production code changes

items.title: Add scope-escape reporting template for agents
items.description: When agents find a task exceeds their mandate, they should use a standard template for reporting. Currently each invents its own format.
items.evidence: Item 5 correctly reported scope limits but in ad-hoc format

items.title: Fix merge-worktrees.sh to propagate file deletions
items.description: merge-worktrees.sh silently drops file deletions. git diff --name-only lists deleted files but script only copies existing, printing SKIP (deleted) without removing $dst. Agent deletions won't propagate to main repo.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: lines 59-62 skip deleted files without corresponding rm in destination

items.title: Add t.Cleanup to chdirTo helper
items.description: chdirTo returns prev dir but does not register t.Cleanup. 20+ callsites manually restore working directory. One missed site corrupts all subsequent tests. Survived 2 post-mortem cycles without fix.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: chdirTo at testutil_test.go:114-124 lacks t.Cleanup; 20+ manual restores

items.title: Consolidate cov3W2CaptureStdout into captureJSONStdout
items.description: Both capture stdout from func() with no return. Only difference is io.ReadAll vs bytes.Buffer.ReadFrom. cov3W2 prefix marks legacy origin. Should be one function.
items.evidence: Both judges: near-identical functions at testutil_test.go:47-88

items.title: Preserve file permissions in merge-worktrees.sh
items.description: Uses /bin/cp -f without -p. Scripts added in worktrees with 755 land in main repo with 644 (umask default). Fix: /bin/cp -fp.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: line 69 uses /bin/cp -f, not -fp

items.title: Add go mod tidy + symlink checks to post-merge-check.sh
items.description: CLAUDE.md No symlinks rule and go mod tidy drift are CI-enforced but not caught by local post-merge script. Add both checks.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: CI validates.yml catches both but local script misses them

items.title: Produce footgun entries as required post-mortem output
items.description: 1-2 cycle lag between footgun discovery and documentation. Make footgun entries a required post-mortem artifact alongside next-work table. Zero-cycle lag.
items.evidence: Learnings judge: Cobra state discovered cycle 1, documented cycle 3

items.title: Create resolveProjectDir migration tracker
items.description: 5/87 production callsites migrated (6%). Without tracked migration plan, pattern risks becoming stranded infrastructure. Track X files per cycle.
items.evidence: Learnings judge: partial implementation can create false sense of closure

items.title: Include scope-escape template in agent dispatch prompts
items.description: Near-zero cost to include template URL in every dispatch. Gives agents sanctioned behavior for unexpected scope overflow. Currently only available if agent knows to look for it.
items.evidence: Learnings judge: scope-escape was invented ad-hoc in cycle 2, formalized cycle 3, not yet injected

items.title: Scan for strings.Trim paired-delimiter misuse in goals/parser
items.description: The backtick-stripping fix found one instance of strings.Trim used for paired-delimiter removal. A targeted grep audit of the goals and parser packages would surface any similar misuses before they cause bugs in production.
items.evidence: parseGateRow fix: strings.Trim(s, '`') strips all leading/trailing backticks, not a matched pair

items.title: Add ASCII fast-path comment to truncate()
items.description: truncate() now always allocates []rune(s) even for short strings. Adding a comment noting the ASCII optimization opportunity (utf8.ValidString + len check) would guide future contributors without blocking the correctness fix.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: minor performance note, non-blocking

items.title: Add 85% coverage gate to CI validate.yml for cmd/ao
items.description: cmd/ao coverage reached 85.1% but there is no CI gate to prevent regression. Add a go test -coverprofile check with a minimum threshold of 85% to validate.yml.
items.evidence: Coverage sprint cycles invest significant effort; no gate means a single PR can regress all work.

items.title: Consolidate cov6-cov21 test files into domain-grouped files
items.description: The 16 cov*_test.go files are fragmented. Consolidate into domain-grouped files (e.g., feedback_loop_coverage_test.go) for maintainability.
items.evidence: 16 small files with sequential numbering is harder to navigate than domain-grouped coverage tests.

items.title: Resolve swarm-remediation-fix unresolved findings (8 items)
items.description: The swarm-remediation-fix batch in next-work.jsonl has 8 unresolved items at 0% resolution rate.
items.evidence: Prior findings resolution tracking shows 8 items unconsumed from swarm-remediation-fix.

items.title: Fix ao mine --json stdout double-write
items.description: When --json is set, printMineSummary writes human-readable text to stdout before json.Encode writes JSON to the same writer. Mixed output is unparseable. Guard: suppress printMineSummary when GetOutput()=="json".
items.evidence: vibe-athena-ag-co7: api-surface judge finding #1

items.title: Rename CoChangeClusters to TopCoChangeFiles in MineReport
items.description: CoChangeClusters [][]string always has ≤1 outer element (single cluster of top-N files). The nested-array shape implies multiple distinct clusters which never occurs. Rename field and flatten to []string.
items.evidence: vibe-athena-ag-co7: api-surface judge finding #2

items.title: Export BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_PORT=3307 in shell env
items.description: BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_PORT is not in the default shell environment, causing bd commands to fail or use wrong port across sessions. Add to ~/.zshenv or .envrc so it is available to all agents and Claude Code sessions.
items.evidence: Post-mortem: recurring env issue across ag-co7 and prior epics

items.title: Normalize defrag file permissions to 0o644
items.description: defrag writes output files with 0o600 (owner-only read). Mine uses 0o644. Normalize to 0o644 for consistency with mine and standard toolchain conventions.
items.evidence: vibe-athena-ag-co7: error-paths judge finding

items.title: Make metadata verification a blocking CI gate and clear current backlog
items.description: Promote metadata verification to a required CI gate and burn down the existing missing-file/broken-link backlog so documentation integrity becomes enforceable.
items.evidence: Metadata preflight: 74 findings (22 missing-file refs, 49 broken links, 3 diagram warnings).

items.title: Enforce strict pre-mortem lock + epic-scoped gating in ratchet/checkpoint
items.description: Require a locked pre-mortem phase tied to the active epic before downstream phases can proceed.
items.evidence: Checkpoint preflight warning: missing locked pre-mortem in .agents/ao/chain.jsonl.

items.title: Add contract-atomic namespace refactor gate for CLI/docs parity
items.description: Fail PRs that rename commands or namespaces unless CLI command inventory and docs/skills references are updated atomically.
items.evidence: Council learnings judge noted repeated stale-command/stale-reference repair cycle.

items.title: Raise and lock cmd/ao coverage floor to 85%
items.description: Update CI thresholds to preserve achieved command-surface test quality and prevent silent regression.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: scripts/check-cmdao-coverage-floor.sh default remains 80.0.

items.title: Re-baseline roadmap closure for delivered vs deferred scope
items.description: Publish explicit closure mapping for roadmap items so plan-compliance remains auditable over rapid release windows.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance judge flagged roadmap closure ambiguity.

items.title: Fix rpi serve --run-id classification for run IDs
items.description: Align run-id parsing so valid persisted run IDs route to watch mode and do not trigger orchestration unexpectedly.
items.evidence: Prior vibe + current review: strict pattern in cli/cmd/ao/rpi_serve.go can misclassify run IDs.

items.title: Harden scripts/cherry-pick-wave.sh pattern handling and delete safety
items.description: Sanitize pattern expansion and remove unsafe fallback deletion paths to prevent destructive behavior outside intended worktree scope.
items.evidence: scripts/cherry-pick-wave.sh retains --pattern glob expansion with rm -rf fallback.

items.title: Resolve command output contract drift for shared output flags
items.description: Normalize output flag behavior across commands so global output-format contracts remain consistent.
items.evidence: Prior vibe findings referenced output flag collisions across mine/defrag/memory/context paths.

items.title: Collapse duplicate skill artifact trees into single-source generation
items.description: Generate runtime-specific skill artifacts from one canonical source and gate divergence in CI.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge flagged drift across skills/, skills-codex/, embedded variants.

items.title: Add targeted tests for uncovered command files export_constraints/inbox/rpi_workers/filelock
items.description: Close intentional command-surface test gaps by adding direct command-path coverage for uncovered files.
items.evidence: Parity matrix: 9 intentionally uncovered files in .agents/council/2026-03-02-command-surface-parity-v2.9.3-to-head.tsv.

items.title: Enforce lead-only worker git guard before spawn
items.description: Harden swarm runtime so worker roles cannot execute git commit/push at spawn-time and during execution. Fail the wave immediately when guard preconditions are missing or disabled.
items.evidence: Wave 3 incident: worker commit/push to main bypassed lead arbitration; learnings and plan-compliance judges flagged P0 control gap.

items.title: Add mandatory source-embedded hook parity gate
items.description: Require parity checks between hooks/* and cli/embedded/hooks/* whenever hook scripts or hook manifest change, and block completion until parity is proven.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge found runtime drift risk: source hook tests can pass while embedded hooks remain stale.

items.title: Implement executable swarm evidence schema validation
items.description: Move worker-result evidence validation from doc-only expectations into executable crank acceptance logic using docs/contracts/swarm-worker-result.schema.json.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance issue-4 marked PARTIAL and tech-debt judge noted schema stronger in docs than runtime enforcement.

items.title: Harden pre-mortem gate fallback to locked-state semantics
items.description: Replace substring-based ratchet fallback checks with structured status verification requiring pre-mortem lock/completion states.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge found fallback can false-pass when ratchet JSON contains pending pre-mortem entries.

items.title: Emit structured time_boxed phase results in phased runner
items.description: On budget expiry, emit explicit phase result status (e.g., time_boxed) and deterministic continuation policy so downstream gates can reason mechanically.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge found `[TIME-BOXED]` marker/log exists but structured phase outcome semantics are under-specified.

items.title: Align TaskCreate command examples with validation allowlist
items.description: Normalize TaskCreate validation command examples to commands accepted by task-validation gate policy and remove patterns likely to be blocked (e.g., shell metacharacter wrappers).
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge identified drift between documented examples and hook allowlist/metacharacter policy.

items.title: Fix ls* prefix to word-bounded pattern in research-loop-detector
items.description: ls* prefix glob misclassifies lsof, lsblk, lstat as read-only Bash commands, incrementing the research counter instead of resetting it. Use word-bounded matching.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge finding #1: ls* matches any command starting with ls

items.title: Replace dead-code double-jq in commit-review-gate.sh
items.description: Line 58 pipes jq output that is discarded, then re-escapes via command substitution. Replace with jq -n --arg ctx pattern used by other hooks.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #4 + plan-compliance gap: inconsistent with research-loop-detector and intent-echo

items.title: Add just/only to intent-echo.sh trigger keywords
items.description: CLAUDE.md Intent Echo rule explicitly mentions just and only as high-ambiguity words, but the hook does not trigger on them. Add as a third condition block.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance gap: CLAUDE.md says especially important for just/only, hook regex lacks both

items.title: Extract shared _validate_restricted_cmd helper
items.description: run_restricted and run_restricted_capture share identical allowlist and metachar checks across ~25 lines. Duplicated allowlist will diverge on update.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #5: 95% code duplication between functions

items.title: Validate assertion regex patterns before grep -E
items.description: Malformed expect_pattern in task metadata causes grep to exit 2, which is treated as match failure and blocks task completion. Validate regex first or wrap grep.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #2: unvalidated regex = false task block

items.title: Move git rev-parse after tool-name filter in research-loop-detector
items.description: git rev-parse --show-toplevel runs before the tool-name case statement, wasting a subprocess on every PostToolUse including neutral tools.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #7: unnecessary subprocess for majority of hook invocations

items.title: Clear .intent-echo-fired flag in SessionStart hook
items.description: 10-minute TTL dedup flag persists across sessions. A new session within 10 minutes of a previous destructive prompt will not get intent-echo. Clear on SessionStart.
items.evidence: Learnings anti-pattern #2: flag-file dedup is session-unaware

items.title: Add empirical threshold calibration pass for research-loop-detector
items.description: Thresholds 8/12/15 chosen by design reasoning, not calibrated against observed session data. Audit counter files after 2-3 weeks of real usage.
items.evidence: Learnings knowledge gap: false-positive rate unknown

items.title: Change assertion density output to additionalContext JSON
items.description: go-vet-post-edit.sh assertion density check writes to stderr only. Agent may not see it. Other hooks use additionalContext JSON injection.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance gap: inconsistent output mechanism across hook set

items.title: Capture git diff once in commit-review-gate
items.description: git diff --cached called twice in separate subshells. Index can change between calls. Capture once and derive line count.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #3: TOCTOU between two git diff calls

items.title: Fix jq filter injection in validate-swarm-evidence.sh
items.description: check_name values interpolated directly into jq filter strings without --arg. Malformed check_name with quotes could break validation or cause false passes.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge finding #4: jq filter string interpolation

items.title: Fix time_boxed StartedAt/DurationSeconds timing inaccuracy
items.description: handleBudgetTimeout uses budget duration instead of actual elapsed time. Phase results contain wrong timing data.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge finding #3: StartedAt computed from budget, not actual start

items.title: Add explicit file manifest to swarm worker prompts
items.description: Workers without file manifests may modify out-of-scope files. Issue 4 worker made 6 out-of-scope Go changes.
items.evidence: Wave 2 worker scope creep requiring revert

items.title: Add wave-patterns.md cross-reference to validate-swarm-evidence.sh
items.description: Script exists but is not linked from wave-patterns.md, making it undiscoverable via docs navigation.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance gap: script not referenced in wave-patterns.md

items.title: Add validate-swarm-evidence.sh to CI pipeline
items.description: Script exists but is not invoked in CI or local validation. Evidence schema contract has no automated enforcement.
items.evidence: Learnings gap #3: script not in CI workflow

items.title: Harden git-worker-guard -a pattern to avoid -au false block
items.description: Case pattern *git add -a* matches git add -au (selective staging). Should only match -A (uppercase) and --all.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge finding #1

items.title: Add pwd assertions at test section boundaries
items.description: cwd leak from bare cd took forensic debugging. Section-boundary pwd checks would catch earlier.
items.evidence: Wave 1 test harness cwd leak bug

items.title: Extract buildHandoffContext field-rendering helpers
items.description: buildHandoffContext CC=25 at budget ceiling. 6 fieldAllowed checks are independent and linear but inflate cyclomatic complexity. Extract field-rendering into helper functions.
items.evidence: Vibe report: buildHandoffContext | 25 | 25 | WARN (at limit)

items.title: Add recursion depth limit to gate retry logic
items.description: verifyGateAfterRetry/handleGateRetry in rpi_phased_gates.go:326-338 have no depth limit when MemRL Enforce mode skips legacy check. Unbounded recursion risk.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge C-1: unbounded recursion in gate retry

items.title: Remove or wire selectHandoffFields into production path
items.description: selectHandoffFields in rpi_phased_manifest.go is only tested, never called in production. buildHandoffContext uses fieldAllowed inline instead. Either remove or wire into production.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge C-2: dead code in production

items.title: Sort verdicts deterministically in buildHandoffContext
items.description: map iteration in buildHandoffContext produces non-deterministic verdict ordering. Sort keys before rendering for reproducible output.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge W-7: map iteration order non-deterministic

items.title: Add file-level dependency matrix to /plan skill
items.description: B+D tracks both modified rpi_phased_handoff.go. Plan listed them as same-wave parallel. Discovered during execution, required Wave 2a/2b split. File-level dependency matrix in plan phase would prevent this.
items.evidence: Phase 3 retro: plan should have declared the dependency explicitly

items.title: Add grep-for-existing-functions to worker task metadata
items.description: D.1 created estimateTokens which already existed in context.go. Worker prompts should include grep step for function-name patterns before implementing new utilities.
items.evidence: Phase 3 retro: should have grepped for existing implementations before writing

items.title: Replace bc dependency in proof-run.sh with awk
items.description: proof-run.sh depends on bc for floating-point comparison. bc is not universally present. Replace with awk for portability.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge W-6: bc not universally present

items.title: Surface audit trail write errors
items.description: writePromptAuditTrail errors are silently discarded with _ =. Should log warnings or return error.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge W-4: silent error swallowing

items.title: Add NarrativeCap semantic documentation to contract
items.description: NarrativeCap=0 means omit with fields present, default 1000 without. Semantic overload documented in code but not in contract doc.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge W-1: NarrativeCap=0 confusion

items.title: Fix double-read in applyConfidenceDecayMarkdown
items.description: applyConfidenceDecayMarkdown reads file twice via parseFrontmatterFields then os.ReadFile. Single read/modify/atomic-write eliminates race window.
items.evidence: Council tech-debt finding #2

items.title: Add .jsonl support to bootstrap-maturity.sh
items.description: Bootstrap script only processes .md files. Existing .jsonl without maturity field silently fail quality gate.
items.evidence: Council tech-debt finding #3

items.title: Add test-fixture impact count to plan baseline audit
items.description: Quality gate cascaded to 12+ test fixtures. Plan baseline audit should count affected test fixtures when adding filters.
items.evidence: Retro: quality gate cascade rule

items.title: Add non-verbose quality gate summary
items.description: Filtered learnings only logged in verbose mode. Add one-line summary in non-verbose output.
items.evidence: Council suggestion #3

items.title: Make private globLearningFiles return errors
items.description: Private lowercase version in inject_learnings.go still silently drops glob errors, inconsistent with fixed public version.
items.evidence: Council suggestion #5

items.title: Add TestResolveSkillPath_InstalledSkill
items.description: Plan required this test but it was not delivered. Installed-skill path ~/.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md is untested.
items.evidence: Council F4: planned in Issue 2 acceptance criteria, absent from test file

items.title: Wire ensureContextDir into --for codepath
items.description: Plan Issue 6 said to wire artifact paths into --for. Functions exist and are tested but have zero production callers.
items.evidence: Council F3: ensureContextDir/contextArtifactDir have no callers outside tests

items.title: Implement sections.include allowlist semantics
items.description: sections.include is parsed into struct but applyContextFilter never reads it. Skills declaring include expect allowlist behavior.
items.evidence: Council F1: Include field populated on parse but not iterated in filter

items.title: Require explicit mapping tables in /plan for struct filtering
items.description: Pre-mortem had to add section-to-field mapping table. Any exclude/filter logic touching structs with 3+ fields needs explicit mapping in plan phase.
items.evidence: Pre-mortem finding 2: TASK exclude was underspecified without mapping table

items.title: Extract section name constants from magic strings
items.description: HISTORY/INTEL/TASK appear as string literals in 6+ locations in inject_context.go. Define constants to prevent typo-induced silent filter failures.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: magic strings in applyContextFilter at 6+ locations

items.title: Add intel_scope and section-name enum validation
items.description: intel_scope accepts any value without validation. Invalid section names in exclude/include are silently ignored. Add enum checks.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: invalid values silently accepted without error

items.title: Document RPI_RUN_ID env var contract
items.description: inject.go:214 reads RPI_RUN_ID with no documentation of format, setter, or fallback behavior.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: undocumented env var dependency

items.title: Sort resolveSkillPath glob matches for determinism
items.description: filepath.Glob for plugin cache returns arbitrary order. Multiple versions produce non-deterministic skill resolution.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge: non-deterministic first-match selection

items.title: Add go-build verification for plan code snippets
items.description: Pre-mortem caught 2 bugs in plan-embedded Go snippets that would have caused build failures. Add compilation step during plan validation.
items.evidence: Pre-mortem F1 (VerbosePrintf) and F2 (cwd redeclaration) were both in plan snippets

items.title: Define consumer contract before wiring scaffolding
items.description: ensureContextDir was wired in Phase 2 but nothing reads from the created directory. Define consumer before wiring to prevent orphaned infrastructure.
items.evidence: Learnings: scaffolding without consumer contract anti-pattern

items.title: Fix Phase 2 step numbering (4.x -> EX.x)
items.description: Phase 2 uses Step 4.x numbering while Phases 3-4 use BP.x/ACT.x. Creates cognitive dissonance when referencing steps in session logs.
items.evidence: S2: Phase/step naming confusion across 6-phase model

items.title: Remove stale .agents/retros/ reference from post-mortem template
items.description: Post-mortem template line 597 references .agents/retros/ for cycle-time comparisons. No skill populates this directory post-refactor.
items.evidence: S3: template references unpopulated directory

items.title: Update SKILL-TIERS.md diagram terminology
items.description: SKILL-TIERS.md diagram says (council + retro) should be (council + knowledge lifecycle).
items.evidence: S7: diagram contradicts redesigned architecture

items.title: Clean stale /learn references in docs/workflows/ (13 files)
items.description: 13 files in docs/workflows/ and docs/SKILL-ROUTER.md reference defunct /learn skill.
items.evidence: S8: stale skill references across workflow docs

items.title: Update flywheel/promotion-tiers.md /learn references
items.description: skills/flywheel/references/promotion-tiers.md lines 15,31 reference /learn and /learn --global which no longer exist.
items.evidence: S16: internal reference doc describes nonexistent functionality

items.title: Add codex mirror delta check to pre-commit sweep
items.description: S1 path bug propagated to codex mirror undetected because mirror sync was Wave 3 afterthought. Add diff check between skills/ and skills-codex/ before committing.
items.evidence: S1 propagated to both source and mirror without detection

items.title: Add sweep-findings triage gate (BLOCK vs WARN)
items.description: Four significant findings were committed without triage step. Classify findings as BLOCK (must fix) vs WARN (can defer) before code freeze.
items.evidence: S1-S3-S7 were all single-line fixes that should have been caught pre-commit

items.title: Fix UTF-8 boundary slicing in narrative truncation
items.description: narrative[:cap] in rpi_phased_handoff.go:270,328 byte-slices multi-byte chars producing invalid UTF-8. Use []rune conversion.
items.evidence: Sweep finding: renderHandoffEntry and buildPhaseHandoffFromState truncate by bytes not runes

items.title: Reorder GOALS.md directives sequentially
items.description: Directives numbered 1,2,3,4,7,8,5,6 instead of 1-8 sequential. Confuses readers and tools parsing by heading order.
items.evidence: Sweep: GOALS.md directive ordering is non-sequential

items.title: Add signal.Stop to serve signal handlers
items.description: signal.Notify without signal.Stop in runServeOrchestrate and runServeWatch. Signal handlers accumulate in long-lived processes.
items.evidence: Sweep: rpi_serve.go:161,226 missing signal.Stop()

items.title: Replace CORS wildcard with localhost validation
items.description: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * on localhost dashboard enables CSRF from attacker domains reading RPI data.
items.evidence: Sweep: rpi_serve.go:365 wildcard CORS

items.title: Surface SSE polling errors to client
items.description: loadRPIC2Events errors silently continue in polling loop. Client receives no indication of data loss.
items.evidence: Sweep: rpi_serve.go:335 silent error swallow

items.title: Add timezone-safe date in release-cadence-check.sh
items.description: date +%s without -u flag can produce incorrect day calculations across timezone boundaries.
items.evidence: Sweep: release-cadence-check.sh:46 timezone drift

items.title: Enforce single-epic scope per crank session
items.description: Mixed na-grf + na-0v2 work in one session creates attribution confusion during post-mortem. Keep sessions to one epic.
items.evidence: na-grf post-mortem: commit 6bd92667 was na-0v2 scope in na-grf session

items.title: Document adhoc ID 1-second collision behavior
items.description: ensureContextDir generates adhoc-<unix-seconds> IDs. Multiple calls within same second collide (safe due to MkdirAll idempotency, but undocumented).
items.evidence: Sweep: inject_context_paths.go time.Now().Unix() granularity

items.title: Add binary version pre-flight to UAT template
items.description: System ao binary was v2.19.1 while local build was v2.19.3+120, causing 3 false missing-command signals. UAT pre-flight must include version assertion.
items.evidence: na-xji pre-flight finding

items.title: Encode UAT scenarios as integration test fixtures
items.description: All 7 UAT scenarios are manual-only with no regression backstop. Encoding them as go test fixtures prevents regression across releases.
items.evidence: Council TD-1: no regression harness

items.title: Add cross-cutting integration wave to UAT template
items.description: Features tested in isolation. No cross-feature flows exercised (mine→defrag, inject→rpi). Add a Wave 3 integration pass.
items.evidence: Council TD-5: no cross-check between workers

items.title: File SSE no-flush as usability issue for rpi serve
items.description: ao rpi serve /events holds TCP connection without flushing headers when no events.jsonl exists. First-time users see a hung connection.
items.evidence: na-xji.5 SSE caveat

items.title: Add default mode or no-checks-selected message to ao defrag
items.description: ao defrag with no flags silently does nothing. Should either run all checks by default or print explicit no-checks-selected message.
items.evidence: na-xji.4 behavioral note

items.title: Refactor runDefrag to reduce cyclomatic complexity from 21 to under 20
items.description: runDefrag at complexity 21 (ceiling is 20). Extract mode-dispatch into helper function.
items.evidence: gocyclo output from na-ff4 vibe

items.title: Wire bats tests and coverage-ratchet into CI validate.yml
items.description: 156 bats tests and per-package coverage ratchet exist but never run in CI. Tests that don't run in CI provide false confidence.
items.evidence: Post-mortem findings #1, #2

items.title: Fix go-test-precommit.sh to use stdin JSON pattern
items.description: Hook uses env vars (CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME) instead of stdin JSON (INPUT=$(cat) + jq). Inconsistent with codebase standard.
items.evidence: Post-mortem finding #4, MEMORY.md lesson

items.title: Add cmd/ao to coverage baseline
items.description: Largest package (44k LOC) not tracked by per-package ratchet. Coverage floor exists separately but ratchet doesn't cover it.
items.evidence: Post-mortem finding #3

items.title: Expand audit-assertion-density.sh to cover all test files
items.description: Script only audits *coverage*_test.go files, missing new test infrastructure shipped in this epic.
items.evidence: Post-mortem finding #5

items.title: Add fuzz seed correctness assertions
items.description: Fuzz targets test no-panic only. Add companion assertions that valid seed inputs produce correct outputs.
items.evidence: Post-mortem finding #6

items.title: Fix coverage-ratchet.sh cmd/ao event format handling
items.description: go test -cover ./cmd/ao outputs event format (1/12 events) not percentage format. Ratchet grep misses it. Use go tool cover -func for cmd/ao.
items.evidence: Worker 1 runtime discovery: coverage baseline entry exists but silently ungated

items.title: Merge 30 *_coverage_test.go into existing *_test.go files
items.description: 30 files have both foo_coverage_test.go and foo_test.go. Move unique tests from coverage variant into main test file, then delete.
items.evidence: Worker 5: 30/35 renames skipped because targets exist

items.title: Wire check-test-staleness.sh into CI validate.yml
items.description: Script exists and works (12 stale, 150 current) but not wired into CI. Add as warn-only job to validate.yml.
items.evidence: Script created but manual-only execution

items.title: Strip 153 TestCov3_ prefixes from 13 canonical test files
items.description: Merge preserved TestCov3_ function name prefix from coverage-era files into canonical *_test.go. 153 functions across 13 files. Pure rename, no logic changes.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge finding #1: naming convention violation propagated through merge

items.title: Merge maturity_deep_test.go and fire_deep_test.go into canonical test files
items.description: 2 *_deep_test.go files (833 LOC) remain with non-standard naming and TestCov3_ prefixes. Consolidate into maturity_test.go and fire_test.go.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance judge: out of scope but residual debt

items.title: Fix hardcoded /tmp path in test-json-flag-consistency.sh
items.description: Line 46 uses /tmp/ao-json-test-stderr. Race condition if parallel runs. Replace with mktemp + trap cleanup.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #3: hardcoded temp file path

items.title: Wire test-json-flag-consistency.sh into CI validate.yml
items.description: Script exists in tests/cli/ but not referenced in CI. Orphaned test provides false confidence.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #3: script unwired from CI

items.title: Fix check-contract-compatibility.sh graceful skip on missing contracts dir
items.description: Hard-exits with FAIL when docs/contracts/ missing. Should warn and exit 0 like the bridge doc check.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #2: hard exit on optional directory

items.title: Run goimports on fire_test.go and maturity_test.go
items.description: Import blocks disordered after merge. Stdlib imports not alphabetized.
items.evidence: Tech-debt finding #4: import block disorder

items.title: Add post-merge function rename step to bulk merge template
items.description: Scaffolding-era function names survive merge into canonical files. Add rename step to merge acceptance criteria template.
items.evidence: Learnings judge: merge without rename anti-pattern across 153 functions

items.title: Document operationalization heuristics in plan template
items.description: Plan defined padding semantically but commit used 8-line threshold not in plan. Plan template should require operationalization heuristic field.
items.evidence: Learnings judge: definition drift between plan and execution

items.title: Add pre-spawn file manifest conflict detection to swarm skill
items.description: Wave 1 Worker 5 reverted Worker 3's regex changes because both touched rpi_serve_test.go and skill_regex_contract_test.go. Pre-spawn file manifest overlap detection would have serialized or isolated these workers.
items.evidence: na-3re W1 cross-worker revert incident

items.title: Clean .agents/retros/ references from Go code
items.description: 6 Go files in cli/ still reference .agents/retros/ which was merged into .agents/learnings/. Worker 10 correctly deferred these to avoid breaking Go fallback paths.
items.evidence: grep -rn .agents/retros/ cli/ shows init.go, gate.go, gate_test.go, ratchet_trace.go, search_test.go, store_helpers_test.go

items.title: Extract _validate_restricted_cmd to lib/hook-helpers.sh
items.description: Helper function added to go-complexity-precommit.sh but not called by any code path. Should be extracted to shared library when a second consumer appears.
items.evidence: grep _validate_restricted_cmd hooks/ shows only go-complexity-precommit.sh

items.title: Add file manifest overlap CI check for swarm pre-flight
items.description: No tooling currently prevents two workers from claiming the same file in the same wave. Add automated overlap detection to swarm pre-flight check.
items.evidence: na-3re W1 file overlap caused manual re-application of Worker 3 changes

items.title: Fix validate-learning-coherence.sh frontmatter-only file
items.description: validate-learning-coherence.sh exits 1 due to 2026-02-26-worktree-refactoring-pattern.md being frontmatter-only. Fix the learning file or update the script to skip frontmatter-only files. Blocks wiring into local CI.
items.evidence: Issue 7 worker tested script and found pre-existing failure

items.title: Add count-verification conformance checks for doc plans
items.description: Agent-generated docs claim numeric counts (job count, function count) without mechanical verification. Add grep -c or wc -l based conformance checks for any plan issue with numeric claims.
items.evidence: CI-CD.md claimed 26 jobs, actual was 29. Vibe caught it but plan conformance should have.

items.title: Add language filter to vibe complexity analysis
items.description: Vibe runs gocyclo on entire cli/ tree even for docs-only epics. Add language detection: if no .go files in git diff, skip Go complexity entirely.
items.evidence: gocyclo hung during vibe for a docs/shell/BATS-only epic

items.title: Add no-jq fallback tests to lib-hook-helpers.bats
items.description: write_failure and write_memory_packet have printf fallback paths when jq unavailable. These branches are untested. Add BATS tests that temporarily hide jq from PATH.
items.evidence: Quality judge flagged untested fallback branches in hook-helpers.sh

items.title: Add canonical_sha and log_sha to evolve cycle records
items.description: Separate implementation provenance from bookkeeping provenance in evolve cycle artifacts so retrospectives can follow a stable audit trail without reconstructing off-by-one drift from git history.
items.evidence: Cycles 25-34 are ledger-bound to SHAs whose commit subjects are one cycle behind; most earlier cycles point at non-cycle implementation commits.

items.title: Persist era-scoped fitness baselines before evolve runs
items.description: Write immutable baseline snapshots per goal era before the next evolve cycle starts. Do not reuse a single cycle-0 label across changing goal surfaces.
items.evidence: The surviving late baseline anchors the 18-goal recovery run near cycle 24, but no universal pre-cycle-1 baseline exists for cycles 0-34.

items.title: Validate cycle-history schema and gap rules at write time
items.description: Reject null or string goal counts, require explicit idle-cycle markers, and fail writes that create unexplained numbering gaps in cycle-history.jsonl.
items.evidence: Cycle 6 records null goal counts, cycle 7 stores goal counts as strings, and cycle 15 is missing from the scoped ledger.

items.title: Fix March 8 CI blockers in bats-tests and coverage-ratchet
items.description: GitHub Actions run 22825014214 for dd3dee64 failed on two concrete regressions: BATS test `pre-push-gate.sh passes when no Go changes` and a coverage ratchet drop in `internal/vibecheck`. Repair both before treating the March 8 chain as fully closed.
items.evidence: Run 22825014214: `not ok 223 pre-push-gate.sh passes when no Go changes`; `coverage-ratchet` reports `DROP internal/vibecheck 100.0% -> 99.2%`

items.title: Publish next-work schema v1.3 and add contract parity checks
items.description: Reconcile `.agents/rpi/next-work.schema.md`, the post-mortem harvest docs, and runtime behavior so the queue has one canonical contract after the per-item lifecycle migration.
items.evidence: Schema still documents entry-level consume and append-only behavior while `cli/cmd/ao/rpi_loop.go` now does per-item claim/release and rewrites the JSONL file

items.title: Make next-work queue mutation concurrency-safe
items.description: Protect queue claim/release updates with locking or compare-and-swap semantics and add a multi-consumer test so `/evolve` and `/rpi loop` cannot silently overwrite each other.
items.evidence: Current queue mutation path rewrites the full JSONL via `os.WriteFile` without synchronization while the contract expects multiple autonomous consumers

items.title: Promote Codex override coverage into CI and widen the guard
items.description: Move `validate-codex-override-coverage.sh` into CI and extend it beyond prompt equality so Codex override inventory and generated output drift are caught outside local pre-push.
items.evidence: March 8 Codex follow-up added a local guard in `scripts/pre-push-gate.sh`, but `.github/workflows/validate.yml` does not enforce it

items.title: Replace skip-based vibe-check git tests with deterministic repo fixtures
items.description: Use temp git repos and forced `GIT_DIR`/worktree setups so vibe-check regression tests always exercise the git-discovery path instead of sometimes skipping.
items.evidence: `internal/vibecheck/timeline.go` coverage dropped to 99.2%; uncovered function is `gitDiscoveryEnv` at 62.5%, and current tests still have skip-based paths around missing git context

items.title: Finish push and pre-push reproducibility hardening
items.description: Close the remaining gap between local pre-push validation and actual push behavior by tightening go-fast scope handling, coverage-floor diagnostics, and worktree-disposition reporting.
items.evidence: The March 8 push path required extra debugging because local validation and actual push behavior diverged; follow-up plan already exists in `.agents/plans/2026-03-08-next-work-after-push.md`

items.title: Fix stale flat next-work append examples in post-mortem source and Codex generated docs
items.description: Update Step ACT.3 in `skills/post-mortem/SKILL.md` and generated `skills-codex/post-mortem/SKILL.md` so they teach the batch-entry v1.3 queue shape instead of the legacy flat-row append example.
items.evidence: Post-mortem plan-compliance review found both skills still show `echo {\"title\": ...} >> .agents/rpi/next-work.jsonl` after the schema v1.3 migration

items.title: Expand next-work contract parity validation to cover producer examples and generated Codex artifacts
items.description: Extend `scripts/validate-next-work-contract-parity.sh` and its regression test to validate `skills/post-mortem/SKILL.md`, generated `skills-codex/post-mortem/SKILL.md`, and other producer surfaces that can author `next-work.jsonl` entries.
items.evidence: The current parity gate passed while stale producer examples remained in both source and generated post-mortem skills

items.title: Promote blocking Codex artifact checks into CI
items.description: Bring `.github/workflows/validate.yml` into parity with the local blocking Codex gate stack by enforcing generated-artifact parity, install-bundle parity, and headless runtime validation in CI.
items.evidence: Post-mortem of na-bnr found local release and pre-push run these checks, but `Validate` only enforces runtime sections, skill parity, and backbone prompts.

items.title: Add failure-path tests for Codex pre-push gates
items.description: Add BATS cases that prove `scripts/pre-push-gate.sh` fails when `validate-codex-backbone-prompts.sh` or `validate-codex-override-coverage.sh` returns non-zero.
items.evidence: The current BATS suite checks gate count and happy-path wiring but does not assert failure behavior for the new Codex gates.

items.title: Add generated/override mismatch fixture coverage for non-backbone required-contract skills
items.description: Extend `tests/skills/test-codex-override-coverage.sh` with a required-contract skill outside the historical backbone set and prove the validator fails on generated/override mismatch.
items.evidence: Plan-compliance judge found the widened operator-contract policy shipped without a non-backbone mismatch fixture.

items.title: Generate operator-contract prompt blocks from catalog during Codex sync
items.description: Teach `scripts/sync-codex-native-skills.sh` to generate required operator-contract sections from `skills-codex-overrides/catalog.json`, or otherwise validate structured output instead of matching literal prompt fragments.
items.evidence: Both retrospective judges flagged verbatim marker matching as the remaining brittle point in the new catalog-driven governance model.

items.title: Make stdout capture helpers panic-safe and parallel-safe
items.description: Refactor shared stdout capture helpers in `cli/cmd/ao/testutil_test.go` so they always restore global state on failure and no longer block safe test parallelization.
items.evidence: Tech-debt judge found current helpers overwrite `os.Stdout` and depend on manual restore ordering.

items.title: Emit structured proof artifacts for evidence-only policy closures
items.description: When work closes on validated repo state rather than a code diff, persist a small proof artifact so later post-mortems can trace closure without relying only on gate output and bead notes.
items.evidence: `na-001` closed correctly, but its proof surface was weaker than the code-bearing items in the same batch.

items.title: Fix closure-integrity audit bead parsing and evidence matching
items.description: Update `skills/post-mortem/scripts/closure-integrity-audit.sh` and generated parity to consume `bd --json`, parse real scoped files from issue data, and tie commit evidence to the audited child so the audit cannot false-fail or false-pass on real epics.
items.evidence: Direct post-mortem execution on `ag-iqa` returned three false `NO EVIDENCE` failures because the shipped audit scraped human `bd show` output that did not match its fixture assumptions; the sweep also flagged raw regex `git log --grep` matching.

items.title: Add negative-path coverage for closure-integrity audits
items.description: Extend regression coverage with fixtures for real `bd show` formatting, `bd children` failure behavior, regex-sensitive child IDs, unrelated historical file touches, and failure-safe cleanup when manifest-validation tests copy artifacts into the repo.
items.evidence: The new tests proved happy-path commit/staged/worktree selection, but post-mortem sweep findings showed parser, regex, and cleanup bugs that are currently unguarded.

items.title: Restore post-mortem template and schema parity
items.description: Bring `skills/post-mortem/references/output-templates.md`, `closure-integrity-audit.md`, and generated Codex artifacts back into parity with the shipped report contract, evidence schema, and multi-child audit workflow.
items.evidence: The sweep found stale post-mortem report templates, an evidence-only closure example missing schema-required `repo_state.repo_root`, and manual audit loops that only process the first child.

items.title: Add hook-env smoke coverage for sibling-worktree git checks
items.description: Add a reusable validation pattern that executes git-aware repo-state scripts under hook-style `GIT_DIR` and `GIT_WORK_TREE` environment plus a sibling worktree layout before those scripts are trusted in push-time gates.
items.evidence: `scripts/check-worktree-disposition.sh` passed in direct shell runs and failed only during `git push` until the script started clearing hook-scoped Git environment variables before inspecting the canonical root.

items.title: Capture git hook env sanitization as a reusable footgun
items.description: When a script inspects any repo other than the current worktree inside a Git hook, unset `git rev-parse --local-env-vars` first. Trigger: hook-scoped sibling worktree checks. Symptom: false branch or disposition results that reproduce only during hooks. Fix: run foreign-repo Git commands through a sanitized environment.
items.evidence: Fix commit `65927c40` and the post-mortem reproduction showed the canonical-root disposition check was reading the task worktree through inherited hook Git environment.

items.title: Capture human CLI parsing as an audit footgun
items.description: Do not build mechanical audit scripts on rendered CLI text when a machine-readable contract exists. Trigger: parsing `bd show` or `bd children` with grep. Symptom: false evidence results when formatting changes or file bullets are not backticked. Fix: consume `bd --json` and validate against structured fields.
items.evidence: The shipped `closure-integrity-audit.sh` returned false failures on `ag-iqa` because it scraped human `bd` output instead of using structured issue data.

items.title: Restore Claude sandbox contract parity or declare runtime-specific semantics
items.description: Preserve the meaning of `sandbox_level` for the Claude backend in `lib/scripts/team-runner.sh`, or explicitly split the runtime contract so the schema and headless docs no longer imply read-only/workspace-write isolation that the Claude path ignores.
items.evidence: Post-mortem tech-debt finding: `team-spec.json` still advertises `sandbox_level`, but the Claude path always uses `--dangerously-skip-permissions`.

items.title: Surface real Claude process failures before timeout fallback
items.description: Refine `watch-claude-stream.sh` and `validate_agent` so early EOF and subprocess crashes are reported as distinct failures instead of collapsing into `timeout` once any event has been seen.
items.evidence: Post-mortem tech-debt finding: watcher status currently masks some real process exit causes.

items.title: Add executable repo-native execution-packet proof path
items.description: Add at least one runtime producer/consumer proof for `.agents/rpi/execution-packet.json` so repo-native orchestration is enforced by executable behavior rather than only by skill text and grep-based validation.
items.evidence: Post-mortem judges found the repo-native slice is still mostly contract-first and documentation-backed.

items.title: Validate crank checkpoint SHAs and timestamps after every wave write
items.description: Add a post-write sanity check for `.agents/crank/wave-*.json` so invalid Git SHAs and impossible timestamps fail immediately instead of lingering until post-mortem.
items.evidence: `.agents/crank/wave-3-checkpoint.json` recorded a non-resolving SHA for the final merged commit.

items.title: Require owner and retirement rule for preserved refs
items.description: When a `codex/preserve-*` branch survives cleanup, record who owns it and what condition retires it so preservation refs do not accumulate indefinitely.
items.evidence: `codex/preserve-ag-rcc-durable-proof-20260309` remains intentionally, but without an explicit retirement rule.

items.title: Plan Codex generated-bundle sync whenever `skills/` behavior changes
items.description: Treat `scripts/sync-codex-native-skills.sh` and the resulting `skills-codex/**` updates as first-order planned scope whenever a change touches `skills/` or Codex-facing skill behavior.
items.evidence: Commit `6c6478622ce7` was required by parity gates after the repo-profile skill changes even though it was not in the original plan.

items.title: Add output_contract to remaining skills
items.description: Only 4 of 52 skills have output_contract. Extend to post-mortem, implement, bug-hunt, and other execution/judgment skills.

items.title: Add additionalProperties check to /plan skill
items.description: Pre-mortem caught additionalProperties:false blocker. Plan skill should grep schemas for strict mode when issues touch JSON schema files.

items.title: Add marketplace/plugin version parity check to release pre-flight
items.description: Release pre-flight checks package.json/pyproject.toml/Cargo.toml versions but not .claude-plugin/plugin.json or marketplace.json. Add version consistency check for plugin manifests.

items.title: Fix docs/CHANGELOG.md pre-commit sync to include entry content
items.description: Pre-commit hook syncs version headers but not entry bodies. Results in empty changelog entries in docs/ copy requiring manual fix post-release.

items.title: Collect BF6-BF9 evidence from first real-project application
items.description: BF6-BF9 Bugs Found column is N/A. Apply to a real project and backfill evidence data.
